title: Gymnadenia mac-owaniana
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea, also known as the fragrant orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support respiratory health and immune system function. The bioactive constituents of Gymnadenia conopsea include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Gymnadenia conopsea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
taxonomy: Gymnadenia mac-owaniana is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Gymnadenia is a part of the subtribe Orchidinae. This species is native to the Indian subcontinent and is often found in Himalayan regions. Gymnadenia mac-owaniana is classified as a terrestrial orchid.
